title: Oslo Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Oslo, with a Z-Score of -3.54. This event is rated as CRITICAL with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Oslo are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 13.4 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 50%, with a moderate wind speed of 9.4 km/h, further exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this cold snap.
